title: Jack Dongarra's Contributions to Cloud Computing Security
description: A conceptual diagram illustrating how Dongarra's high-performance computing (HPC) work intersects with and influences modern cloud security principles.
relationships: HPC principles provide the scalable foundation for cloud architecture
Numerical accuracy and data integrity are fundamental security concerns in scientific cloud workloads
Benchmarking standards ensure reliable and predictable performance, a key aspect of security and trust
HPC research informs the development of secure, high-performance computing environments in the cloud
